zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Bretagne於1295年12月14日出生在法國布列塔尼時，她的父親Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne34歲，母親Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort32歲。她於大約1316年與Guy X de Laval在法國布列塔尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1384年12月7日在她的家鄉享年88歲，埋葬在瑞士瓦特利阿巴易。

zh-hans.Guilliers,Morbihan,France: 法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Bretagne于1295年12月14日出生在法国布列塔尼时，她的父亲Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne34岁，母亲Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort32岁。她于大约1316年与Guy X de Laval在法国布列塔尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1384年12月7日在她的家乡享年88岁，埋葬在瑞士瓦特利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.description: Decisive Battle against the counts of Habsburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Bretagne was born on 14 December 1295, in Brittany, France, her father, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, was 34 and her mother, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, was 32. She married Guy X de Laval about 1316, in Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 December 1384, in her hometown, at the age of 88, and was buried in L'Abbaye, Vaud, Switzerland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Bretagne est née le 14 décembre 1295, à Bretagne, France, son père, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Guy X de Laval environ 1316, à Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1384, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suisse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Bretagne am 14. Dezember 1295 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne 34 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort 32. Sie hat um 1316 in Bretagne, Frankreich Guy X de Laval geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1384 im Alter von 88 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in L'Abbaye, Waadt, Schweiz begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Bretagne è nata il il 14 dicembre 1295 nel Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Guy X de Laval circa 1316, nel Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1384, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a L'Abbaye, Vaud, Svizzera.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Bretagneが1295年12月14日にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagneは34歳，母Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfortは32歳であった。約1316年にフランスブレタグンでGuy X de Lavalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1384年12月7日に故郷で88歳で死去し，スイスヴァウドル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Bretagne(이)가 1295년 12월 14일 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1316년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 Guy X de Laval(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 12월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 스위스 바드 '압베이에 묻혔다.

mn.14 December 1295–7 December 1384: 1295 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 14–1384 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 7

pt.14 December 1295–7 December 1384: 14 de dezembro de 1295–7 de dezembro de 1384
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Bretagne nasceu em 14 de dezembro de 1295, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy X de Laval aproximadamente 1316, em Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1384, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suiça.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Bretagne родилась 14 декабря 1295 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy X de Laval около 1316 г. в местности бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 декабря 1384 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности л'аббеи, вауд, Швейцария.

es.14 December 1295–7 December 1384: 14 de diciembre de 1295–7 de diciembre de 1384
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Bretagne nació el 14 de diciembre de 1295, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Guy X de Laval aproximadamente 1316, en Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1384, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suiza.
